name: tic
description: MVP monorepo for TIC digital agency site (Nest + React)

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @tic/shared && npm run build --workspace fragui && npm run build --workspace api && npm run build --workspace web
scripts.build:web: npm run build --workspace @tic/shared && npm run build --workspace fragui && npm run build --workspace web
scripts.build:api: npm run build --workspace @tic/shared && npm run build --workspace api
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace api && npm run lint --workspace web
